# 📱 Task Tracker — GitHub se APK Banayein

Ye guide follow karein — koi software install nahi karna, sab GitHub pe hoga.

---

## 🔰 Step 1 — GitHub Account Banayein

1. https://github.com par jaayein
2. Sign Up karein (free hai)
3. Email verify karein

---

## 📁 Step 2 — New Repository Banayein

1. GitHub par login karein
2. Upar right corner mein "+" icon click karein
3. "New repository" select karein
4. Name dein: task-tracker
5. Public select karein
6. Create repository click karein

---

## 📤 Step 3 — Files Upload Karein

Repository page par:
1. "uploading an existing file" link click karein
2. ZIP extract karein apne PC par
3. Saari files aur folders select karein aur drag and drop karein
   IMPORTANT: .github folder bhi select karein (Ctrl+A se sab select ho jaayega)
4. Neeche "Commit changes" button click karein

---

## Step 4 — Build Automatically Shuru Ho Jaayegi

Files upload hote hi GitHub apne aap APK banana shuru kar dega!

1. Repository mein "Actions" tab click karein
2. "Build Android APK" workflow dikhega
3. Yellow circle = build chal rahi hai (5-10 minute lagenge)
4. Green tick = APK ready!

---

## Step 5 — APK Download Karein

1. Actions tab mein green build click karein
2. Neeche "Artifacts" section mein "TaskTracker-APK" dikhega
3. Click karein — ZIP download hogi
4. ZIP extract karein — andar app-debug.apk milegi

---

## Step 6 — UptoDown par Publish Karein

1. https://uptodown.com par developer account banayein
2. APK file upload karein
3. App description, screenshots dein
4. Submit karein!

---

Problem aaye toh Claude ko screenshot bhejein!
